2.title: Current sessions
2.query:
timeseries sessions = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.pool.stat.cur.sessions),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:pool }
| fieldsAdd f5:pool_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:pool)
| sort arrayAvg(sessions) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Active members
3.query:
timeseries cnt = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.pool.active.member.cnt),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:pool }
| fieldsAdd f5:pool_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:pool)
| sort arrayAvg(cnt) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Members
4.query:
timeseries cnt = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.pool.member.cnt),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:pool }
| fieldsAdd f5:pool_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:pool)
| sort arrayAvg(cnt) desc
| limit 20

6.title: Executions
6.query:
timeseries count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.rule.event.stat.total.executions.count),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:rule }
| fieldsAdd f5:rule_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:rule)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

7.title: Failures

| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

10.title: Incoming errors

| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

11.title: Outgoing errors

| fieldsAdd f5:interface_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:interface)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

12.title: Fatal alerts

  by: { dt.entity.f5:profile }
| fieldsAdd f5:profile_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:profile)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

13.title: Fatal alerts

  by: { dt.entity.f5:profile }
| fieldsAdd f5:profile_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:profile)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

14.title: Pool state

| fieldsAdd f5:pool_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:pool)
